ast.source: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com
ast.target: 在 ko-fi.com 上请我喝杯咖啡

ast.name: error
ast.source: Omnisearch - Error while loading Minisearch cache
ast.target: Omnisearch - 加载 Minisearch 缓存时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: Omnisearch: Error while parsing Dataloom file
ast.target: Omnisearch：解析 Dataloom 文件时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: Omnisearch - Error while loading embeds cache
ast.target: Omnisearch - 加载嵌入缓存时出错

ast.name: log
ast.target: Omnisearch - HTTP 服务器已终止

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable caching to speed up indexing time. In rare cases, the cache write may cause a crash in Obsidian. This option will disable itself if it happens.
ast.target: 启用缓存以加快索引速度。在极少数情况下，缓存写入可能导致 Obsidian 崩溃。如果发生这种情况，此选项将自动禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-executes the previous query when opening Omnisearch.
ast.target: 打开 Omnisearch 时重新执行上一次的查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
By default, files that are in Obsidian's "Options > Files & Links > Excluded Files" list are downranked in results.
        Enable this option to completely hide them.
ast.target:
默认情况下，位于 Obsidian“选项 > 文件与链接 > 排除文件”列表中的文件在结果中排名靠后。
        启用此选项可完全隐藏它们。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folders to downrank in search results. Files in these folders will be downranked in results.  They will still be indexed for tags, unlike excluded files.  Folders should be comma delimited.
ast.target: 在搜索结果中降低排名的文件夹。这些文件夹中的文件在结果中排名会降低。与排除的文件不同，它们仍会被索引标签。文件夹应以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enable this if Obsidian often freezes while making searches.
        Words shorter than 3 characters won't be used as prefixes; this can reduce search delay but will return fewer results.
ast.target:
如果 Obsidian 在搜索时经常卡顿，请启用此选项。
        长度少于3个字符的单词将不会作为前缀使用；这可以减少搜索延迟，但会返回更少的结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enable this if you want to be able to search for URLs as separate words.
        This setting has a strong impact on indexing performance, and can crash Obsidian under certain conditions.
ast.target:
如果您希望将 URL 作为单独的单词进行搜索，请启用此选项。
        此设置对索引性能有较大影响，在某些情况下可能导致 Obsidian 崩溃。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open and create files in a new pane instead of the current pane.
ast.target: 在新窗格中打开和创建文件，而不是在当前窗格中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the level of fuzziness for the search. The higher the fuzziness, the more results you'll get.
ast.target: 定义搜索的模糊程度。模糊度越高，获得的结果越多。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will display a notification if the server is enabled, at Obsidian startup.
ast.target: 如果服务器已启用，将在 Obsidian 启动时显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a button on the sidebar to open the Vault search modal.
ast.target: 在侧边栏添加一个按钮，用于打开库搜索弹窗。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows the contextual part of the note that matches the search. Disable this to only show filenames in results.
ast.target: 显示与搜索匹配的笔记上下文部分。禁用此选项将仅显示结果中的文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Activate this option to render line returns in result excerpts.
ast.target: 启用此选项可在结果摘要中渲染换行符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will highlight matching results when enabled. See README for more customization options.
ast.target: 启用后将高亮匹配的结果。更多自定义选项请参阅 README。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can set custom weights for values of header properties (e.g. "keywords"). Weights under 1.0 will downrank the results.
ast.target: 您可以为标头属性的值设置自定义权重（例如“keywords”）。权重低于1.0将降低结果的排名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files that have been modified more recently than [selected cutoff] are given a higher rank.
ast.target: 最近修改时间超过[选定截止时间]的文件将获得更高的排名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a LOT of logs for debugging purposes. You also need to enable "Verbose" logging in the console to see these logs.
ast.target: 添加大量用于调试的日志。您还需要在控制台中启用“详细”日志才能看到这些日志。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 遵循 Obsidian 的“排除的文件”

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folders to downrank in search results
ast.target: 在搜索结果中降低排名的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 忽略阿拉伯语变音符号（测试版）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show a notification when the server starts
ast.target: 服务器启动时显示通知

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 索引不支持文件的路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Set frontmatter property key as title

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%c读取属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致过时值
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%c尝试卸载未挂载的组件
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%c尝试卸载状态代理而非组件
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%c`<svelte:boundary>` `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Dexie SchemaDiff: Schema was extended without increasing the number passed to db.version(). Dexie will add missing parts and increment native version number to workaround this.
ast.target: Dexie SchemaDiff：架构已扩展，但未增加传递给 db.version() 的数字。Dexie 将添加缺失部分并递增本机版本号以解决此问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Dexie: Workaround for Chrome UnknownError on open()
ast.target: Dexie：针对 Chrome 在 open() 时的 UnknownError 的解决方法

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Omnisearch ⚠️ There might be an issue with your cache. You should clean it in Omnisearch settings and restart Obsidian.
ast.target: Omnisearch ⚠️ 您的缓存可能存在问题。请在 Omnisearch 设置中清理缓存并重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Omnisearch - 已禁用。请重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Omnisearch - 已启用。请重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Omnisearch - Error while creating excerpt, see developer console
ast.target: Omnisearch - 创建摘录时出错，请查看开发者控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Omnisearch - 错误 - 无活动编辑器

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Omnisearch - HTTP 服务器已终止

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Omnisearch - Cache missing or invalid. Some freezes may occur while Omnisearch indexes your vault.
ast.target: Omnisearch - 缓存缺失或无效。Omnisearch 索引您的仓库时可能会出现一些卡顿。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Omnisearch - Cache cleared. Please restart Obsidian.
ast.target: Omnisearch - 缓存已清除。请重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Omnisearch - Your index cache may be incorrect or corrupted. If this message keeps appearing, go to Settings to clear the cache.
ast.target: Omnisearch - 您的索引缓存可能不正确或已损坏。如果此消息持续出现，请前往设置清除缓存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Omnisearch - There was an error while loading the cache. Please restart Obsidian.
ast.target: Omnisearch - 加载缓存时出错。请重启 Obsidian。
